steps.t: Lore-master Rúni waits for you by the falls in western Clovengap. You should talk to Rúni.
The waterfall is in eastern Clovengap. Rúni the Lore-master believes there is a hidden cave behind the nearby waterfall. You should find the cave.
The secret tunnel is within the crystal cave, Min Návaid. The journal spoke of a secret tunnel whose entrance can be revealed by the light of the cand…
Praushod the Foetid lies deeper within Min Návaid. You should summon Praushod the Foetid by striking the corrupted crystals.
The dragon bones are in Min Návaid. Lore-master Rúni has asked you to investigate the cave for dragon bones.
Lore-master Rúni is in the crystal cave. You should tell Lore-master Rúni that the deed is done.
